channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 30.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting insists he can win Labour leadership race despite ‘underdog’ status
item.description: Wes Streeting insists he can win Labour leadership race despite ‘underdog’ status

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – as it happened
item.description: Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – as it happened

item.title: i Politics: The Labour leadership contender who will campaign for Burnham in by-election race
item.description: The Labour leadership contender who will campaign for Burnham in by-election race

item.title: BBC Politics: UK net migration needs to fall further, says Andy Burnham
item.description: UK net migration needs to fall further, says Andy Burnham

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Carney vows a better Canada after Alberta plans a vote on seeking independence
item.description: Carney vows a better Canada after Alberta plans a vote on seeking independence

item.title: The Guardian: Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10 - The Guardian
item.description: Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10 - The Guardian

item.title: i Politics: Burnham's income tax pledge if he becomes PM
item.description: Burnham's income tax pledge if he becomes PM

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham does little to hide his true ambitions with a by-election launch promising ‘change’
item.description: Andy Burnham does little to hide his true ambitions with a by-election launch promising ‘change’

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10
item.description: Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10
